title: Ovarian Cancer Symptoms Women Should Not Ignore
excerpt: Bloating, early fullness, pelvic discomfort — ovarian cancer often starts quietly. A gynaecological oncologist explains what to watch for, why there is no routine screening test, and when to seek medical help.

title: Uterine Cancer Awareness Month: Symptoms, Diagnosis & Treatment
excerpt: A Gynaecological Oncologist answers the most common patient questions on uterine cancer — fibroid vs cancer symptoms, diagnosis tests, and when to seek urgent evaluation.

title: The Journey of the HPV Vaccine in India
excerpt: The HPV vaccine has had a long and challenging journey in India. Dr. Dipanwita Banerjee, Gynaecological Oncologist, traces the milestones from 2008 to 2026 and makes the case for universal vaccination.

title: Understanding Cervical Cancer Screening & HPV Vaccination in India
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to modern cervical cancer prevention — covering screening intervals, who should be screened, vaccine eligibility, and what to expect during a colposcopy.
